Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given three cases 1 2 3 in an event log We need to check each case against the normative rules and the desiderata

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normative Rules Strict The sequence must be Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ordering rules Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment must occur before Loan Decision Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision If loan is approved Finalize Documentation must occur before Close Case If loan is rejected do not finalize documentation before closing the case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata Recommended but not strict Credit Check should be completed within a short time window after the application is received for example within 24 hours The applicant should be informed promptly for example within 48 hours of the loan decision It is encouraged to perform a Follow up Call to the applicant sometime before closing the case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Normative Check Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation because approved Close Case Correct

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Credit Check 0930 before Risk Assessment 1000 Correct Risk Assessment 1000 before Loan Decision 1100 Correct Inform Applicant 1300 after Loan Decision 1100 Correct Approved Finalize Documentation 1330 before Close Case 1400 Correct

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Desiderata Check Credit Check within 24 hours Met Inform Applicant within 48 hours Met Follow up Call Not present but it is optional

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Normative Check The sequence is broken at the beginning Risk Assessment is done before Credit Check This violates the rule that Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Additionally the loan is rejected but Finalize Documentation is performed This is explicitly not allowed If loan is rejected the case should be closed without finalizing documentation

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait let me reexamine the log for case 2 Missing Inform Applicant This is a required activity So another normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Additional Violation in Case 2 Missing Inform Applicant The process must inform the applicant after the loan decision This activity is absent

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We do not need to check because normative violations are already present and severe But for completeness Credit Check within 24 hours Met

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Conclusion for Case 2 Normative violations Risk Assessment done before Credit Check order violation Missing Inform Applicant skipping a required activity Finalize Documentation after rejection violation of decision logic

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Normative Check Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation because approved Close Case Correct

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Credit Check before Risk Assessment Correct Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Correct Inform Applicant after Loan Decision Correct Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case Correct

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Desiderata Check Credit Check 49 hours after application more than 24 hours violation Inform Applicant 51 hours after loan decision more than 48 hours violation Follow up Call Not done optional

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Summary Violations of Normative Rules Case 1 None Case 2 Risk Assessment performed before Credit Check Missing Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation performed after a rejection Case 3 None

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Failures to Meet Desiderata Case 1 Follow up Call not performed optional Case 2 Credit Check timing met Inform Applicant missing is a normative issue Follow up Call missing optional Case 3 Credit Check 49 hours after application violation Inform Applicant 51 hours after loan decision violation Follow up Call not performed optional

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case 2 Why was Risk Assessment done before Credit Check Maybe an error in the process execution or perhaps a preliminary risk assessment was done quickly without the credit check and then the credit check was done later

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Why was Inform Applicant skipped It could be an oversight or perhaps the officer thought that since the loan was rejected informing was not necessary

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Why was Finalize Documentation done after rejection It might be that the officer mistakenly thought that some documentation was needed even for rejection

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case 3 The credit check delay 49 hours later might be due to non working days and the informing delay 51 hours might be due to a backlog or waiting for approval to send the letter
